prestazioni: Engine: EJ207 (closed-deck, semi-forged internals) with Tomei 272° duration, 11.5mm lift camshafts (PonCam Type-B) and Tomei adjustable cam gears for optimized valve timing under high-RPM boost conditions. Paired with a Garrett GT3076R .86 A/R turbocharger (ball-bearing, 60mm compressor inducer) on a custom 3-inch divorced wastegate manifold (HKS Hi-Power 40mm external gate) to eliminate backpressure and spool the turbo at 3,800 RPM with 1.5 bar of boost on 98 RON fuel.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1,050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual-core fuel rail and Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump (upgraded to a 340 LPH surge tank for track use). ECU reflash via Cobb Accessport (v3) with a custom tune by Top Secret Japan, targeting 450 WHP at 7,200 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline (stock rev limiter removed via ECU patch).

Drivetrain & Chassis: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (front and rear) with 4.44 final drive ratio (STI RA-spec R180 rear diff) and a PPG straight-cut 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.785, 2nd: 1.944, 3rd: 1.545, 4th: 1.266, 5th: 1.088, 6th: 0.919). Suspension features Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 20mm front/rear camber plates) with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) and a Whiteline rear subframe brace (adjustable for preload). Braking system includes Endless CC-RG6 355mm 2-piece rotors (front) with 6-piston calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Tilton 75-series master cylinder and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Aero: Voltex Type-3R widebody kit (carbon fiber, 30mm extended fenders) with a custom 3D-printed front splitter (30% chord, 25mm overhang) and a Seibon carbon fiber GT wing (1,800mm span, 300mm chord, 30mm Gurney flap). Underbody features a custom aluminum diffuser (50mm exit height) with integrated vortex generators and a Cusco rear diffuser brace to prevent flex under high-speed aero loads.

Exterior: Full Respray in Subaru World Rally Blue (M3Y) with a 3-stage PPF (XPEL Ultimate) and custom gold BBS LM-R wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 tires (255/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear). STI Spec C-specific mods include a JDM V-limited front bumper (with integrated tow hook) and a carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 50% weight reduction) featuring a custom NACA duct (2.5-inch diameter) feeding the Garrett intercooler.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2) and a custom bolt-in roll cage (Custom Cages, 4130 chromoly, 3.2mm wall thickness) featuring a rear X-brace and integrated harness bar. Steering wheel is a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a Cusco short shifter (35mm throw reduction) and a custom aluminum shift knob (weighted, 200g). Gauges include a Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod (carbon fiber, 3D-printed).
